boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on consent-status class
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires consent-status class before enrollment
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 lacks consent-status class; 047 trap open

final_answer: Action may not proceed. AUTH-BOR-082 and STD-BOR-082-P confirm site/protocol/consent/date but omit required consent-status class. FEAS-BOR-082 flags separate verification. Boundary remains open per policy. Escalate to close abstract-field defect before activation.
